data.body: In agent-identity.ts: replace 'openrouter' with 'opencode' in AgentProviderId. Replace PROVIDER_LABELS entry. Delete OPENROUTER_PROVIDER_LABELS and normalizeOpenRouterModel(). Update detectAgentProviderId() to detect 'opencode'. Remove 'orapi' source branch from normalizeAgentIdentity(). Simplify detectAgentSource().
data.title: Replace OpenRouter with OpenCode in agent-identity
